checks.description: reference and predicted ligand coordinates are finite 3D values
reference/predicted ligand atoms share a declared atom-order contract
pose success uses the best rigid-aligned RMSD over allowed symmetry permutations
predicted ligand coordinates must not contain impossible self-clashes
protein structure, binding-site frame, and ligand provenance are present

posebusters_style_boundary: The packet defines PoseBusters-style sanity checks for a local harness. It does not vendor PoseBusters, infer chemistry, or replace toolkit-backed bond/order/protonation validation once real ligands are attached.
